name: Strawberry Broil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the strawberries in an ungreased shallow baking dish.
2. Mix the sour cream and cinnamon together.
3. Spoon the mixture over the berries.
4. Sprinkle the brown sugar evenly on top.
5. Broil for about 3-4 minutes until bubbly.
6. Serve with low-fat ice cream if desired.
